item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 12min I can't believe I bet on this team. I've lost my mojo. Might need to take a few weeks of
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 12min I can't believe I bet on this team. I've lost my mojo. Might need to take a few weeks off. Cita Martian @LalimesMartian · 17h Jesus fucking christ. Fuck our lives. Somebody tell me this isn’t real. 2 10 2 mil

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 13min In his first and only seven-round mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @chad_reuter foreca
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 13min In his first and only seven-round mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @chad_reuter forecasts some Day 1 surprises and four first-round trades. See all of his projections, 1-257.
